title: New Year Prayer Service
content: Join us for a special New Year prayer service on January 1st at 6:00 PM. Let's welcome the new year with prayers and thanksgiving.

title: Bible Study Classes Resume
content: Our Wednesday Bible study classes will resume on January 10th at 7:00 PM. All are welcome to join us in the fellowship hall.

title: Youth Camp Registration Open
content: Registration is now open for our annual youth camp (March 15-17). Contact the church office for more details and registration forms.
